label: Do you prefer hiring a professional cleaning service for the apartment rather than doing the deep cleaning ourselves?

options.label: Yes, hire a cleaner
No, do it ourselves

label: I wipe down the shower/sink and ensure no hair or water pools are left behind immediately after every use.
I strictly separate all my waste (glass, paper, plastic, compost) and expect my housemates to do the same.
After cooking a meal in the evening, what is your standard protocol for cleaning the kitchen?

options.label: Clean as I go, and the kitchen is spotless before I sit down to eat
Leave the pots/pans while I eat, but everything is cleaned before I go to bed
Leave it to soak; I will deal with it the next morning or afternoon

label: I proactively empty the dishwasher as soon as it's clean, rather than picking clean dishes out of it one by one.

bipolarLabels.right: A highly strict, documented weekly roster

label: If we are not hiring a cleaner, how should household chores be managed?

bipolarLabels.left: Fluid and communal; put things wherever they fit
bipolarLabels.right: Rigid and territorial; strict assigned shelves per person

label: How do you manage space inside the shared refrigerator?
Which best describes your ideal approach to food and groceries?

options.label: Highly integrated: We share most groceries and frequently cook for each other
Semi-integrated: We share basics (milk, butter, spices) but buy our own main meals
Strictly separated: We have our own shelves and never use each other's food

label: Prefer separate cookware.
It bothers me when personal items (e.g., laptops, mail, shoes, jackets) are left sitting in the shared living room for multiple days.
Do you prefer shoes on or off indoors?
I regularly notice when household supplies are running low and replace them before they run out entirely.
If I miss my chore, I do it within 24h without prompts.
Okay with a monthly deep-clean day.
How do you prefer to handle the purchase of shared basics (e.g., toilet paper, olive oil, cleaning supplies)?

options.label: A shared household bank account/pot that we both contribute to monthly
One person buys, and we meticulously track and split it on an app (e.g., Splitwise/WieBetaaltWat)
We each just buy our own separate supplies to avoid any financial coordination

bipolarLabels.left: It is strictly for my personal use
bipolarLabels.right: It is fully communal for the house to use

label: If you own a high-end appliance (e.g., a €500 espresso machine or Vitamix), how do you treat it?
If the internet goes down or the sink starts leaking, what is your natural reaction?

options.label: I immediately take charge, call the provider/landlord, and fix it
I will message the house group chat to see who has time to handle it
I am usually too busy with work; I rely on my housemates to handle house administration

bipolarLabels.left: It is an absolute burden; do not ask me
bipolarLabels.right: I am totally happy to help out

label: If your housemate travels for work for a week, how do you feel about watering their plants or feeding their cat/dog?
Guests can use my cookware if they clean it after use.
When the living room needs a new piece of furniture (e.g., a sofa or TV), do you prefer to split the cost 50/50, or should one person buy and own it outright?

options.label: Split 50/50 (Communal)
Buy and own outright (Individual)

label: If someone repeatedly misses their chores, there should be agreed-upon consequences.
Do you want to co-decorate the living room with your personal art, plants, and photos, or should the common areas remain neutral?

options.label: Co-decorate and personalize
Keep it neutral and minimalist

label: In your opinion, how often does a shared bathroom need a comprehensive 'deep clean' (scrubbing tiles, mopping floors)?

options.label: Once a week
Once every two weeks
Once a month
Less than once a month

bipolarLabels.left: We need a strict, agreed-upon morning shower schedule to ensure everyone gets to work on time

label: Morning bathroom logistics.
If you host a dinner party on a Saturday night, when is the kitchen and living room fully cleaned and restored?

options.label: That same night before I go to sleep
The next morning by 11:00 AM
Sometime on Sunday afternoon when I have energy
